title: The Andhra Pradesh and Madras (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1959
full_text: The Andhra Pradesh and Madras (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1959 null Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195956 Act Number: 56 Enactment Date: 1959-12-24 Act Year: 1959 Short Title: The Andhra Pradesh and Madras (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1959 Long Title: An Act to provide for the alteration of boundaries of the States of Andhra Pradesh and Madras and for matters connected therewith.आन्‍ध्र प्रदेश और मद्रास (सीमा-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1959 Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-04-1960 Notification: 1st April, 1960, vide Notification No. S.O. 2863, dated 29th December, 1959, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
